title: Fort Smith, AR — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Fort Smith, AR: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Fort Smith is a city in AR with a population of 90,000. Historic frontier city on the Arkansas-Oklahoma border with a strong manufacturing base.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
